final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational infographic explaining the definitions and relationships between AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, and CLI.

Style/medium: needs a "手绘风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2010s tech explainer sketch illustrations (e.g., Google Doodle hand-drawn style), IKEA assembly diagram clarity, Japanese 図解本 visual guide tradition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include visual flow connecting all 7 concepts with clear relationship arrows and grouping
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with definitions and visual icons/symbols for each:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an approachable, educational atmosphere — exact mood balance is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include all 7 concept names (AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI) and their relationship labels
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concepts with definitions, must show relationships between concepts clearly
Avoid:
